name: wf-bugfix-multi
prompt:
Read pipeline-buggy.rkt carefully. It has THREE bugs:
1. stage-filter drops the last element of the filtered list
2. stage-sort uses > instead of < (sorts descending instead of ascending)
3. make-pipeline reverses stages, applying them in wrong order

Fix all three bugs. Do not change stage-map, stage-deduplicate, or pipeline-process.
description: Pattern 1+5: Fix multiple related bugs in one module — common in audit remediation
